message: feat(cli): add am check quality gate (br-bb0gt.1)

files.patch:
@@ -136,6 +136,7 @@ fn cli_help_snapshots() {

     let cases: &[(&str, &[&str])] = &[
         ("top_level", &["--help"]),
+        ("check", &["check", "--help"]),
         ("serve_http", &["serve-http", "--help"]),
         ("serve_stdio", &["serve-stdio", "--help"]),
         ("share", &["share", "--help"]),

@@ -0,0 +1,11 @@
+Run the unified local pre-release quality gate
+
+Usage: am check [OPTIONS]
+
+Options:
+  -q, --quick            Quick mode: skip long-running perf and E2E gates
+  -r, --report <REPORT>  Write JSON report to this path
+      --format <FORMAT>  Output format: table, json, or toon (default: auto-detect)
+      --json             Output JSON (shorthand for --format json)
+  -p, --parallel         Run independent gates in parallel (faster execution)
+  -h, --help             Print help

@@ -6,6 +6,7 @@ Commands:
   serve-http
   serve-stdio
   check-inbox                 Check agent inbox for unread messages (for git hooks and editor integrations)
+  check                       Run the unified local pre-release quality gate
   ci                          Run CI quality gates (format, lint, build, test)
   bench                       Run native CLI benchmarks
   lint
